creator: kennyknickers@hotmail.com
text:
I finally managed to get a successful build yesterday (after a trip through dependency-hell and back) and am having an issue with it, but I think it’s ZoneMinder (or my config) rather than a port problem.

They’ve made a 1.34.2 release now as well, I’m new here and don’t know the etiquette - do we handle it in this bug, or log a new one?
